title: School Assistant
description:
Job Description:

  • Assist the Operations Manager in daily operational duties
  • Carry out general cleaning duties and supervise other cleaners
  • Monitor cleaning supplies, equipment, and logistics
  • Clear and dispose of rubbish at designated bin centres
  • Ensure cleanliness of the school canteen, including high-pressure water jet cleaning
  • Marshal and manage traffic within the school premises
  • Provide logistics support for school activities and functions
  • Perform administrative and operational duties as assigned
  • Safeguard official information and comply with confidentiality requirements

Requirements:

  • Minimum two (2) years of experience in general cleaning, canteen, or operations-related work, or equivalent
  • Physically fit and able to perform manual and operational duties
  • Experience working in a school environment is an advantage
  • Able to supervise and coordinate the work of cleaners
  • Experience in traffic marshalling within a school setting is advantageous

postedCompany.description:
Dynamic Safety Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based QEHS consulting firm established by a team of experienced professionals committed to delivering comprehensive Environment, Workplace Safety & Health, and Quality solutions to organisations across various sectors.

Alongside our strong capabilities in QHSE Management System Auditing, Consulting, Outsourcing and Training, we also provide a wide range of manpower support services to meet the operational needs of industries in Singapore.

Our manpower services cover the deployment of qualified and experienced personnel, including:

  • WSH Officers, WSH Coordinators, ECOs, Safety Supervisors, Fire Safety personnel

  • Technical staff, Operations support staff

  • Receptionists, Administrative Executives, Customer Service personnel

  • Teachers, Student Care staff, Early Childhood assistants

  • Lab Assistants, Science/Technical support staff

  • Logistics, Warehouse, Production, and Field Support manpower

  • Other specialised manpower based on project requirements

With a team that brings together global expertise and strong local industry experience, Dynamic Safety Pte Ltd ensures clients receive reliable, cost-effective, and practical solutions that support compliance, enhance productivity, and promote workplace excellence.

We remain dedicated to delivering high-quality consulting services and dependable manpower support, helping organisations operate safely, efficiently, and successfully in today’s challenging business environment.
postedCompany.name: DYNAMIC SAFETY PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D21 Upper Bukit Timah, Clementi Park, Ulu Pandan
